name: seconds-clock
title: Seconds Clock
description: A focused seconds clock with polished multi-timer and stopwatch support.
author: syed_hyder

commands.name: show-seconds-clock
commands.title: Show Seconds Clock
commands.description: Open a large flip-clock-style view with live seconds.

commands.name: set-timer
commands.title: Set Timer
commands.description: Create a named countdown timer from natural duration text.

commands.name: manage-timers
commands.title: Manage Timers
commands.description: View, rename, favorite, extend, and stop timers.

commands.name: start-stopwatch
commands.title: Start Stopwatch
commands.description: Start a stopwatch that counts up from zero.

commands.name: show-stopwatch
commands.title: Show Stopwatch
commands.description: View the running stopwatch in Raycast.

preferences.name: timeFormat
preferences.title: Time Format
preferences.description: Choose whether the clock uses a 12-hour or 24-hour format.
